name: Pacing Activity counter
description: Horizontal counter chart showing daily activity vs pacing budget. Used in dashboard summary view.

name: Pain Scale Slider 0-10
description: Accessible 0-10 numeric pain rating slider with haptic feedback support and large touch targets.

name: Symptom Entry Card
description: Card component for logging a single symptom type with severity, time of day, and notes field.

name: Bottom Navigation Tab
description: Mobile bottom nav tab with icon, label, and active state indicator. Meets 44px minimum touch target.

name: Primary Button
description: Primary CTA button - large, medium, and small variants. High contrast AA-compliant.

name: Secondary Button
description: Secondary outlined button for non-primary actions. Paired with Primary Button in action rows.

name: Pacing Budget Ring
description: Circular progress ring showing percentage of daily pacing budget used. Color-coded green/yellow/red by threshold.

name: Professional Alert Banner
description: Full-width alert for overdoing warnings. Variants: info, warning, critical. Dismissible with persistent option.

name: Onboarding Step Card
description: Single-step card for onboarding wizard. Includes step indicator, illustration, headline, body, and Next CTA.

name: Activity Log Row
description: Single row in the activity log list. Shows activity name, duration, MET score, and pain rating after.

name: Chart Tooltip
description: Floating tooltip for symptom trend graph. Displays date, value, and contextual note on data point tap.

name: Text Input Field
description: Standard text input with label, configured, error state, and helper text. Used throughout app forms.

name: Coach Message Bubble
description: Chat-style message bubble for Occupational Therapy coach communication thread. coach and participant variants.

name: Avatar / Profile Photo
description: Circular avatar with photo, initials fallback, and online/offline indicator. Sizes: 24, 40, 64px.

name: Modal Dialog
description: Center-sheet modal with header, scrollable body, and action fouter. Backdrop dismiss configurable.

name: Status Badge
description: Small inline badge for status labeling - active, pending, overdue, completed. ARIA role=status.

name: Date Picker
description: Calendar date picker for log entry dates and goal-setting screens. Single and range selection modes.

name: Toggle Switch
description: Accessible toggle for settings screens. Includes label, description, and disabled state.

name: Weekly Sparkline
description: Compact 7-day sparkline chart for weekly symptom trend. Used in dashboard summary cards.

name: Professional Report Header
description: Report header with coach logo, participant name block, date range, and Occupational Therapy provider signature area.
